title: Cohort study assessing the impact of COVID-19 on venous leg ulcer management and associated clinical outcomes in clinical practice in the UK.
author: Guest JF Fuller GW
content:
S-EPMC9944296 PMC9944296 Cohort study assessing the impact of COVID-19 on venous leg ulcer management and associated clinical outcomes in clinical practice in the UK.

Objective

To assess the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on venous leg ulcer (VLU) management by the UK's health services
